What can I make with tesco chicken breast, potatoes, carrots?
Great combination! Try making a stir-fry - cook the protein first, then add vegetables and finish with a simple sauce of soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.

Recipe ideas for tesco chicken breast, potatoes, carrots?
With tesco chicken breast, potatoes, carrots, you could make a delicious one-pan meal. Try roasting the protein with the vegetables at 200°C for 25-30 minutes, seasoned with herbs and olive oil.
